atomicity.message: This is one recording-only administrative/docs change: record OSL owner decisions and close the five corresponding OSL decision beads.

conditions.message: The staged docs/tracker payload passes the requested formatting and hash checks.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0.
go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json matched sha256:b07e848327a63d422a3585fa68a027a2d179986e75ed4b5dcde46b7c4b094e08.
The staged hash included only .beads/issues.jsonl and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md with no hash-excluded staged paths.

conditions.message: The staged change records owner decisions without adding duplicate launch implementation or execution artifacts.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json returned sha256:b07e848327a63d422a3585fa68a027a2d179986e75ed4b5dcde46b7c4b094e08 with included paths .beads/issues.jsonl and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.
git diff --cached --name-status showed only M .beads/issues.jsonl and M docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.
The staged decision diff says the rulings are recording-only and do not authorize launch execution, visibility changes, old-release deletion, external issue filing, or other outward-facing action.
git diff --cached --check exited 0.

conditions.message: The commit records decisions without laundering launch readiness or relaxing launch blockers.
evidence: The staged D-OSL-3 section tightens launch blockers for secrets/tokens, personal data, local machine paths, and legacy project-readiness-kit naming.
The staged D-OSL-5 section says no public launch and no repo visibility flip until explicit owner permission.
The five decision beads are closed with close reasons saying Recording only; they do not claim audit, release deletion, launch, visibility, or filing work was completed.
ScarletMarsh independently confirmed downstream OSL audit/execution beads remain open, including the preflip gate, old-release handling, flip verification, and other public-prep beads.

conditions.message: The staged payload changes a decision Markdown file and Beads tracker JSONL only; it adds no functions, code paths, or tests.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed only M .beads/issues.jsonl and M docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.
The staged decision diff and tracker status changes contain no executable code.

conditions.message: The requested owner rulings are recorded and the five corresponding decision beads are closed.
evidence: The staged decision doc records all owner rulings: repo home, MIT license/no Apache NOTICE, stricter history thresholds, v0.1.0/v0.1.1 release deletion approval for later execution, quiet README-only launch with hard permission gate, and denied external issue filing.

br list -a --limit 300 --json showed exactly five OSL decision beads closed: project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-repo-home-kh4, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-license-dv7, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-history-threshold-iu8, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-old-releases-m28, and project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-launch-announcement-uxh.
Those decision beads each have close reasons pointing to the staged decision doc.
Eighteen OSL work beads remain open, including preflip gate, private release, public flip, audit, license, installer, README/community, and security work.
br dep cycles returned no dependency cycles.

conditions.message: The staged docs and tracker state carry explicit evidence for the owner rulings and decision-bead closures.
evidence: The staged decision diff adds OSL owner decisions, 2026-07-03 with D-OSL-1 through D-OSL-6.

The new section records repo home, MIT license, history thresholds, old-release deletion approval but not execution, README-only launch with hard owner-permission gate, and denied local-only issue filing.
Staged .beads/issues.jsonl closes exactly the five OSL decision beads with close reasons citing the corresponding D-OSL entries.
Downstream OSL execution and audit beads remain open.

conditions.message: Scope is limited to recording decisions and closing the five decision beads.
evidence: git diff --cached --stat showed only .beads/issues.jsonl and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.
git diff --cached --numstat confirmed no source, license, release, installer, workflow, GitHub metadata, or generated attestation files are staged.
The staged doc explicitly says it does not authorize launch execution, visibility changes, old-release deletion, external issue filing, or other outward-facing action.
The Beads close reasons for the five decision beads all say Recording only; none closes downstream implementation, audit, or launch beads.
ScarletMarsh independently confirmed no launch, README, license, installer, security, or release files are staged.

conditions.message: The staged payload records future deletion approval but executes no deletion or destructive action.
evidence: D-OSL-4 approves deleting v0.1.0 and v0.1.1 releases later but explicitly says this commit records approval only and says not to delete releases or assets until the launch plan reaches that execution step.
No LICENSE, README, install.sh, SECURITY.md, .github, issue-draft, dist, or bin paths are staged.
No destructive command or release deletion artifact is staged.

conditions.message: The staged hash, decision text, decision-bead closures, and dependency graph are internally consistent.
evidence: go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json matched the packet hash and path list.

Before staging, all OSL decision beads were open; staged state closes only project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-repo-home-kh4, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-license-dv7, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-history-threshold-iu8, project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-old-releases-m28, and project-readiness-kit-osl-decide-launch-announcement-uxh.
br dep cycles returned no dependency cycles.

conditions.message: The staged decision record tightens security and launch boundaries without executing any outward-facing action.
evidence: D-OSL-3 makes secrets/tokens, personal data, local machine paths, and legacy project-readiness-kit naming hard launch blockers.
D-OSL-5 forbids public launch and repo visibility flip until explicit owner permission.
D-OSL-6 keeps both issue bundles local-only unless later owner authorization exists.
git diff --cached --name-status and staged hash output show no public-repo, GitHub release, filing, network, credential, or visibility-changing surface is staged.

ScarletMarsh noted existing source_repo_path local paths remain in tracker records, but this commit classifies local machine paths as launch blockers and leaves audit/preflip beads open rather than hiding that work.

conditions.message: The staged payload has no UI, TUI, demo, screenshot, visual asset, CSS, or rendering surface.
evidence: The staged path list contains only .beads/issues.jsonl and docs/decisions-2026-07-02-review-round.md.

conditions.message: The staged payload is docs/tracker recording only and introduces no runtime path, algorithm, query, benchmark, build behavior, or performance-sensitive code.
evidence: The staged path list and diff content show only the decisions doc and .beads/issues.jsonl are modified.

conditions.message: The commit records owner rulings while preserving owner-only authority for later launch, visibility, deletion, and filing execution.
evidence: The staged decision doc records owner rulings as decisions while explicitly saying they do not authorize execution of launch, visibility changes, old-release deletion, external issue filing, or other outward-facing action.
The five close reasons are framed as Owner ruling recorded and Recording only.
br show project-readiness-kit-osl-flip-anonymous-verify-3ab --json shows the visibility flip bead remains open and still requires the private-launch path before execution.
